HOME.SUBTITLE_1: I develop reliable web experiences, design secure network infrastructures
HOME.SUBTITLE_2: and manage complex systems — merging code and automation.

ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Full-Stack & Software Developer / Tech Specialist
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION:
My journey started at IIS G. Vallauri in Fossano, where I graduated in Computer Science and Telecommunications. But it was outside the classroom — between personal projects and nights spent debugging — that my true passion for full-stack development was born: from frontend to backend, all the way to desktop applications. Recently, this interest has been paired with a growing passion for cybersecurity, because I believe that writing valid code is not enough: you also need to know how to protect it.

What sets me apart, more than the technologies I know, is the way I approach a project: I never see it as a simple exercise, but as something to invest effort and care for details in, from the first line of code to the final test. I also believe in the value of teamwork: collaborating, sharing ideas, and — when needed — leading a team allows me to build better solutions than I would achieve on my own.
ABOUT.QUOTE: Every goal is possible when an idea meets consistency, curiosity, and vision.
